basics.name: Octavio Ramirez
basics.label: IT Support Technician & Junior Full Stack Developer
basics.summary: IT Support and Software Development Technician with over 2 years of experience leading Tier-1 and Tier-2 technical support in a high-demand government environment. Highly skilled in reducing system downtime, resolving complex hardware/software issues under high-availability standards, and managing LAN networks and multi-user systems in Windows and Linux (Ubuntu/Debian) environments. Currently pursuing a Software Development degree at ICOP and a Web & Multimedia Informatics degree at UNL. I bridge a solid IT operations foundation with modern full-stack development skills (Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL, REST APIs, Python) to build secure, efficient, and user-friendly digital tools. Proactive, detail-oriented, and open to remote and hybrid positions.

work.name: Casa de Gobierno — Santa Fe
work.summary: Led comprehensive technical support and local IT infrastructure maintenance for a critical government department, providing Tier-1 and Tier-2 support for 100+ public employees and ensuring maximum system uptime.
highlights: Reduced average incident resolution time (MTTR) by 30% through the standardization of troubleshooting protocols and rigorous ticket management.
Guaranteed 99%+ system uptime department-wide by installing, configuring, and updating Windows 10/11 environments and customized Linux (Ubuntu/Debian) distributions.
Diagnosed and resolved 50+ monthly hardware and software incidents (desktops, laptops, networks, and peripherals), applying critical preventive maintenance that cut recurring failures by 25%.
Designed and implemented the expansion of local LAN networks and structured cabling for 80+ nodes, boosting physical network reliability and decreasing connectivity issues by 40%.
Administered user credentials, institutional software systems, and network access privileges in strict alignment with internal cybersecurity and compliance guidelines.
Managed technological hardware asset inventories, optimizing component replacement costs through structured preventive maintenance cycles.

education.area: Degree in Web Applied Informatics & Multimedia Design

projects.name: Inventory Management System
projects.description: Premium full-stack web application designed to automate and control real-time stock levels. Integrates product flows (inflow/outflow), supplier tracking, and auto-restocking alerts.
highlights: Built a high-performance RESTful API using Node.js and Express.js, featuring secure endpoints and validation middleware for key CRUD actions.
Modelled and optimized PostgreSQL relational schemas with robust referential integrity constraints, securing transaction safety across all product stock entries.
Designed an elegant, mobile-friendly interactive frontend with HTML5, CSS3, and DOM manipulation via vanilla JavaScript.
Implemented structured Git Workflows (branch-per-feature, code reviews, semantic commit messages) in alignment with agile product practices.

projects.name: FlyReserve
projects.description: Premium native mobile application for commercial flight bookings, featuring an immersive UI, augmented reality (AR) for luggage sizing, and a 3D payment gateway.
highlights: Designed an immersive, glassmorphic UI using React Native and Expo, featuring translucent card overlays and soft shadows for iOS and Android.
Built an Augmented Reality (AR) suitcase measurement tool integrating the device camera with 3D bounding boxes.
Developed an interactive checkout system with a custom 3D credit card that rotates 180 degrees dynamically based on form input.
Integrated realistic airplane takeoff audio triggers and local automated push notification queues using Expo libraries.

projects.name: CertiWebs
projects.description: Academic web application for the creation, real-time validation, and public query of web development certifications. Built as an integrative final project for UNL.
highlights: Designed and implemented the user authentication and multi-tier administration dashboard for institutions and students.
Developed a dynamic server-side document engine to generate downloadable and print-ready PDF diplomas and credentials.
Modelled the relational database and engineered scalable backend endpoints to ensure high transaction speeds.
Established secure public validation flows to verify certification authenticity via unique cryptographic reference keys.

projects.name: NutriWeb
projects.description: Professional and premium landing page for a nutritionist, featuring a fully responsive layout and interactive animations without relying on external frameworks.
highlights: Designed and implemented a premium user interface using pure HTML5 and CSS3, featuring a curated color palette (dark green, coral, and mint) and elegant typography.
Developed advanced interactive animations using Vanilla JavaScript, including parallax effects, animated counters, 3D card tilts, and real-time form validation.
Optimized User Experience (UX) with a mobile-first approach and intelligent scroll-spy navigation, ensuring seamless adaptability across all devices.
Engineered a lightweight, dependency-free architecture that achieves optimal load times and simplifies project deployment.
